caption: From the video picture to the fourth, this hasn’t been a straight line. My weight went down, went up, and then down again. There were ups and downs, moments of motivation and moments of doubt and that’s the reality no one really talks about. What I’ve learned is that progress isn’t about being perfect, it’s about consistency and discipline. That’s what actually changes your body over time. I’m not at my final goal yet. I still want to lose around 3 more kg to reach my ideal weight. I started slightly overweight, and now — for my height I’m healthy, stronger, and more confident than before. This is just the beginning. More progress to come, more goals to hit, and I can’t wait to see where I’m at next year. Trust the process and keep going. #fyp #weight #gym #gymmotivation #gymlife

caption: Before and after some cutting phases with a high protein intake🍗. -> losing fat and building muscles at the same time.  I have been going up and down in fat% since I started my gymjourny, both with intention and not❤️  This phase has been very intentional. I’ve been cutting for a couple of months, with some pauses in between, while staying strict with my protein intake so I don’t lose muscle. I’m really happy with the results, but I’ll definitely go back to bulking at some point to build more glutes and thicker muscles! My body looks different every day due to inflammation and water retention. In the second video I’m not swollen, but on other days my face and waist are much more swollen, which is totally normal. Whatever your fitness goals are, I truly believe you can do it. Take your time and never compare your journey to anyone else’s ❤️ #gymtok #fyp

caption: Azu enséñanos una rutina de cardio para hacer en casa💦💦💦 Esta rutina la amarás!!! Solo necesitas de ti💪🏽 Aquí les comparto mi rutina de full body de hoy!! Estuvo🔥🔥🔥 3set x 50seg cada ejercicio. Con solo tu peso corporal💪🏽 recuerda hacerlo a un ritmo donde sepas que podrás cumplir con la mayoría del tiempo, si te diete es, tranquila, respira y continúa💪🏽 Fue mi primer full body en tres semanas, no había hecho ejercicio de impacto (por el dolor en mi vientre) el hacer ejercicios de impacto me inflamaban horrible, me daba dolor y sangrado. Ya estoy bastante mejor, me atreví y lo hice💪🏽 desafortunadamente me inflame un poco pero bueno, me disfruté mi rutina, amo los full body!!  Han hecho una parte importante en mi proceso del cuerpote. Quieres entrenar conmigo? Descarga y suscríbete a mi App💜 link en mi Bio. Feliz domingo💕💕💕 #fit #fitness #fitnessmotivation #fitgirl #fitspo

Using all my fav @myprotein products first thing to keep me going (electrolytes - watermelon 🍉 is the BEST) (multi-vitamins + hair, skin + nail gummies!) - CODE BROOKS ad  This probably won’t be a regular occurrence (due to the falling asleep at 2pm and 4 coffees … ) but it felt really good to prioritize my movement even though I had a busy schedule! 45 Foward day 2, see ya!! Day 3 is going to be a fun one … 😅✈️ #45forward #newyearchallenge #5amroutine

caption: MI GLOW UP: ANSIEDAD, DEPENDENCIA, TRISTEZA, INSEGURIDAD, las únicas emociones que me podían describir por aquel entonces. He aprendido con ayuda de profesionales pero sobre todo con mi propia ayuda a dejarlo todo atrás y crear una versión nueva de mi, una sana, una poderosa y segura. Eso es lo que deseo para todas esas personas que una vez se han sentido o se sienten como yo! Para aquellos que no ven la luz, MIRAD! HAY SALIDA, SE PUEDE! No es un camino fácil, no es de rosas. Es una auténtica montaña rusa pero merece la pena luchar, luchar por ti, luchar por una vida plena y longeva. Confía y no dejes que esos monstruos de la mente ganen❤️🫂, pero no te preocupes que aquí estaré yo siempre motivándote y enseñándote que se puede! 🙏🏻

caption: whenever I post about my transformation, one of the most common comments I get is “you looked healthier before”, and I can understand why people say it.  From the outside, I looked more like what people are used to seeing, but bodies can look healthy while being deeply unwell, and while being stuck in cycles that feel impossible to escape.  This version of myself is calmer, happier, and healthier in so many ways that aren’t just physical.  If any part of this resonates with you, just know you’re not alone 💛 and it doesn’t have to stay this way.

caption: Cada vez me cuesta más hacer estos videos porque no entiendo como me hice eso, como me permití estar así de mal con mi cuerpo.  Antes de que alguien tire hate (sera bloqueado/a) miren mi perfil.  Abrazo haber sido gorda toda la vida porq en gran parte me hizo la persona que soy hoy. Me moví en todos los ambientes que quise sin un cuerpo hegemónico y hoy mi espejo me cuesta, estoy amigándome con la persona que soy y el cuerpo en el que vivo.  Si tenes el primer cuerpo la idea no es hacerte sentir mal, pero a mi, me hacía pésimo ❤️‍🩹  Te abrazo, me abrazo, abrazo a la valen de antes y le agradezco a la vida.  #transformacionfisica #bajardepeso #agradecer #confiar #saludmental

caption: Losing weight won’t make you happy… If you haven’t done the work on the inside! It’s that time of year where we are all thinking of shedding some lbs getting back in the gym and changing our habits. 💪🏋️ After loosing 50lbs in the past 18 months I can hand on heart say loosing weight didn’t make me any happier if anything I was happier in a bigger body where I wasn’t always worried about putting it on, People having opinions or commenting on my body when I didn’t ask for it!  I wanted to loose weight as we lost a good friend last year and it gave me the shock I needed to prioritise my health.. My knees where hurting I was shattered and getting in unhealthy habits with binge eating.. BUT my dress size and the body I looked at in the mirror I loved! I see my worth at every stage because I’ve done the self worth work over the years as society won’t be there for you in a bigger body! so you can be there for yourself ❤️💕 So just think am I wanting to loose weight for me? Or for them? and if it’s for everyone else dig deep and think WHY! #weightloss #newyear #midsize #curvy #meaganwells

author.bio:
Collabs: Ian@the8thmgmt.com 
Shop my links on LTK ⬇️

caption: Can we please stop pretending that 10k steps is some miracle solution for weight loss. It’s not. The success of weight loss is 90% your diet, and most people aren’t even aware of how many hidden calories they snack on during the day. All those matcha lattes, little “healthy” snacks, a tablespoon of oil here and there… none of that is free in calories. You can walk 10k steps and still be in a calorie surplus. All it will really give you is sore feet. And let’s be realistic. 90% of the population is working, we have our lives, our kids, responsibilities. Who actually has an extra hour every single day to walk when sometimes we don’t even have time to do real workouts? #10ksteps #weightlosstransformation

caption: Si de verdad te importara cambiar, ya estarías haciéndolo. No es el tiempo. Nunca lo fue. Es tu miedo a verte transformado. Es tu comodidad diciéndote que “mañana empiezas”. Es ese autosabotaje que te mantiene exactamente donde estás. La vida no espera a nadie. Tus resultados tampoco. ¿Quieres progresar? Actúa. ¿Quieres seguir igual? Excúsate. La diferencia entre el que lo consigue y el que se queda soñando es una sola: DECISIÓN. Hoy puedes elegir que mande tu mente… o que manden tus excusas. Tú decides quién gana. 🧠🔥 ⠀ ⠀ #disciplina #noexcuses #gymmotivation #fitlife #mindset

caption: How to do an aggressive cut (the right way): Over the past 9 weeks, I dropped 11kg by being strategic — not reckless. If you want to lose fat fast, here’s what matters: 	•	Set calories low, but still high enough to fuel training and recovery. 	•	Prioritize high protein to hold onto muscle. 	•	Train hard 4–5x a week — don’t just “diet and hope.” 	•	Get 10k+ steps per day to keep fat loss moving without burning out. 	•	Sleep well, manage stress, and stay consistent even when motivation dips. Aggressive cuts work if you do them properly and stay locked in. If you’re unsure where to start or you need accountability, DM me for 1:1 coaching and I’ll guide you through your transformation. 🫡 #fyp #gym #GymTok #weightloss #fatlosstips #fatlosstransformations #weightlosstransformation #fitness

caption: i officially started my cut yesterdayyy. so for the next 3 months i’ll be sharing exactly how i’m gonna lean out while keeping all the muscle 1. if you underfuel your glute days, performance will drop & when performance drops, muscle retention will drop as well. thats why i eat at maintenance cals on my leg days & create a bigger deficit on rest/upper days. this way my weekly cals still put me in fat loss but my priority sessions get properly fueled!! 2. if lets say your hip thrust drops from 120kg to 90kg then your body has 0 reason to keep that same muscle. if your strength drops a bit, thats normal but big drops usually mean you’re underfueling, overdoing cardio or dieting too aggressively 3. if you destroy your legs with hip thrusts, RDLs, squats & then do an hour of stairmaster after, you’re compromising your recovery. i personally do incline walking on leg days & save stairmaster for upper days to make sure i can properly recover #caloriedeficit #gymtips #glutegrowth #cutting #dieting
